summary: He has pivoted from a bearish stance characterized by shorting Ethereum to explicitly declaring that 'the bottom is in' for the crypto markets.
narrative: After spending late 2025 profiting from short positions on ETH, Maeda’s most recent analysis indicates a major trend reversal where he argues the market is bottoming. He now suggests that structural factors and marginal buyers could propel Bitcoin to higher prices, contradicting standard four-year cycle theories.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
